allow: Bash(python3 -c "import secrets; print\('SECRET_KEY=' + secrets.token_hex\(32\)\); print\('POSTGRES_PASSWORD=' + secrets.token_urlsafe\(24\)\)")
Bash(ssh root@10.0.30.50 "docker exec recall-redis-1 redis-cli llen default && docker exec recall-redis-1 redis-cli llen transcription")
Bash(ssh root@10.0.30.50 "docker exec recall_ollama ollama list")
Bash(ssh root@10.0.30.50 "docker exec recall-redis-1 redis-cli keys 'celery*' && docker exec recall-redis-1 redis-cli keys '_kombu*'")
Bash(ssh root@10.0.30.50 "docker exec recall-redis-1 redis-cli llen celery")
Bash(ssh root@10.0.30.50 "docker exec recall-redis-1 redis-cli del celery")
Bash(ssh root@10.0.30.50 "docker exec recall-redis-1 redis-cli llen default && docker exec recall-redis-1 redis-cli llen celery")
Bash(ssh root@10.0.30.50 "docker inspect recall-worker-1 --format '{{.Created}}' && docker inspect recall-api-1 --format '{{.Created}}'")
Bash(ssh root@10.0.30.50 "docker exec recall-api-1 python -c \\"from app.workers.celery_app import celery_app; print\(celery_app.conf.task_routes\)\\"")
Bash(ssh root@10.0.30.50 "docker exec recall-redis-1 redis-cli llen default && docker logs recall-worker-1 --tail 10 2>&1")
Bash(ssh root@10.0.30.50 "docker exec recall-redis-1 redis-cli llen default && docker logs recall-worker-1 --tail 15 2>&1")
Bash(ssh root@10.0.30.50 "docker exec recall-redis-1 redis-cli keys '*' | grep -v binding | grep -v meta | grep -v pidbox")
Bash(ssh root@10.0.30.50 "docker exec recall-api-1 python -c \\"from app.workers.tasks import summarize_meeting; print\(summarize_meeting.queue\)\\"")

Bash(ssh root@10.0.30.50 "docker exec recall-redis-1 redis-cli lindex celery 0 2>&1 | python3 -c \\"import sys,json; d=json.loads\(sys.stdin.read\(\)\); print\(d.get\('properties',{}\).get\('delivery_info',{}\)\)\\"")
